name: cosel
tagline: High-Reliability Power Supplies for Industrial and Medical Applications
description: Cosel is a leading Japanese manufacturer of high-reliability power supplies, specializing in AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, and EMI filters for industrial, medical, and telecommunications applications. With over 50 years of experience, Cosel is renowned for product quality, reliability, and innovation.
longDescription: Cosel Co., Ltd., founded in 1969 in Japan, is a world-leading manufacturer of high-reliability power supplies. The company specializes in designing and manufacturing AC-DC switching power supplies, DC-DC converters, and EMI filters for demanding applications in industrial automation, medical equipment, telecommunications, and transportation. Cosel is known for its commitment to quality, with products manufactured in Japan under strict quality control systems. The company's power supplies feature high efficiency, compact designs, and long operational lifetimes. Cosel's medical power supplies are certified to IEC 60601-1 standards, while industrial products meet various international safety and EMC standards. With a global sales network and strong technical support, Cosel serves customers worldwide. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo provides comprehensive support for Cosel products including technical consultation, sample evaluation, and supply chain services.
seoTitle: Cosel Power Supplies - Authorized Distributor | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Cosel AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, and EMI filters. High-reliability power solutions for industrial and medical applications.

faqs.question: What makes Cosel power supplies different from competitors?
faqs.answer: Cosel power supplies are distinguished by several key factors: Japanese manufacturing with strict quality control ensures exceptional reliability and consistency. High efficiency designs (up to 95%) reduce energy consumption and operating costs. Compact and lightweight packages maximize power density. Comprehensive 5-year standard warranty demonstrates confidence in product quality. Medical certifications to IEC 60601-1 3rd Edition for patient safety. Wide operating temperature ranges for harsh environments. Long product lifecycles ensure supply continuity for industrial applications. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo can provide detailed comparisons and technical guidance for selecting the right Cosel solution.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for a detailed comparison of Cosel power supplies versus competitors for your specific application.

faqs.question: What industries does Cosel serve?
faqs.answer: Cosel serves a wide range of industries with specialized power solutions: Industrial Automation - Factory automation, process control, robotics, and machinery; Medical Equipment - Patient monitors, diagnostic equipment, imaging systems, and therapeutic devices; Telecommunications - Base stations, network equipment, data centers, and communication systems; Transportation - Railway systems, electric vehicles, and transportation infrastructure; Test & Measurement - Laboratory equipment, test systems, and measurement instruments; Renewable Energy - Solar power systems, energy storage, and grid infrastructure. Each industry has specific requirements that Cosel addresses with tailored product features and certifications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your industry-specific power requirements and find the optimal Cosel solution.

faqs.question: What is the warranty period for Cosel products?
faqs.answer: Cosel provides industry-leading warranty coverage: Standard warranty of 5 years for most AC-DC power supplies and DC-DC converters. Extended warranty options available for critical applications. Warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use conditions. Products are repaired or replaced at Cosel's discretion. Warranty registration may be required for certain product lines. The long warranty period reflects Cosel's confidence in product quality and reliability. For warranty claims or questions, contact BeiLuo technical support for assistance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our support team for warranty registration and claims assistance.

faqs.question: Does Cosel offer custom power supply solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Cosel offers custom and modified standard power solutions for specific customer requirements. Customization options include: Modified electrical specifications (voltage, current, protection levels); Mechanical modifications (form factor, mounting, connectors); Enhanced environmental ratings (extended temperature, conformal coating); Special certifications or testing; Private labeling and branding. The customization process involves: Requirements definition and feasibility assessment; Design and prototyping; Testing and validation; Production and quality assurance. Custom solutions require minimum order quantities and development lead times. For standard applications, Cosel's broad portfolio of off-the-shelf products often meets requirements at lower cost and shorter lead times.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss custom power requirements and evaluate feasibility.

faqs.question: What safety certifications do Cosel products have?
faqs.answer: Cosel products carry comprehensive international safety certifications: Medical: IEC 60601-1 3rd Edition, ANSI/AAMI ES60601-1, CSA C22.2 No. 60601-1; Industrial: IEC 62368-1, UL 62368-1, EN 62368-1, CB scheme; EMC: EN 55032, EN 55024, FCC Part 15, VCCI; Environmental: RoHS, REACH, WEEE; Quality: ISO 9001, ISO 14001. Specific certifications vary by product series. Medical power supplies have 2xMOPP isolation and ultra-low leakage current. Industrial products meet standard safety requirements for various applications. All certifications are current and products are tested to latest standards versions. Contact our FAE team for specific certification documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team for certification documentation and compliance guidance.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Cosel products?
faqs.answer: Cosel product lead times vary by product type and availability: Standard products from stock: 1-2 weeks; Standard products to order: 4-6 weeks; High-power or specialized models: 6-8 weeks; Custom or modified products: 8-12 weeks. Factors affecting lead time: Product type and power rating; Current demand and factory capacity; Custom requirements or special testing; Certification requirements for specific regions. BeiLuo maintains inventory of popular Cosel products for quick delivery. For production programs, we offer forecasting and planning support, scheduled deliveries, and long-term supply agreements. Contact our sales team for current lead times and availability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo sales for current lead times and inventory availability.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Cosel power supply for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Cosel power supply involves several considerations: Input requirements: AC input voltage (85-264V universal or specific range), DC input for DC-DC converters; Output requirements: Voltage, current, power rating, regulation, and ripple; Environmental conditions: Operating temperature, humidity, altitude, vibration; Safety and regulatory: Required certifications (medical, industrial, railway); Mechanical: Package size, mounting style, connector type; Reliability: MTBF requirements, expected lifetime, warranty; Special features: Parallel operation, remote sensing, power good signal, remote on/off. Cosel's product selector tools and datasheets provide detailed specifications. Our FAE team can assist with selection, providing technical recommendations based on your specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use our product selector or contact our FAE team for personalized power supply recommendations.
